use_cases: Numeric quantity input with increment/decrement buttons for e-commerce or inventory forms
Value adjustment through cursor scrubbing/dragging interaction
Accessible number input with keyboard navigation support
Form component for SaaS dashboards requiring numeric data entry
ai_summary: A number field component built on Base UI featuring increment/decrement stepper buttons and a scrub area for adjusting values by dragging. The component implements minimalist flat design with hover states and accessible focus outlines. Supports keyboard navigation and serves as a reusable numeric input primitive for forms in SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tool applications.
